name: peeptrend-youtube-gaming-trend-finder
description: Find rising Steam games and YouTube content opportunities before the niche gets crowded.

interface.shortDescription: Find rising Steam games and YouTube opportunities before niches get crowded.
interface.longDescription: PeepTrend connects Codex to focused MCP tools for YouTube gaming trend research, Steam opportunity discovery, title checks, shelf saturation, channel-name checks, and creator planning.
defaultPrompt: Find YouTube gaming opportunities for my market.
Check if this video title is crowded.
Turn this Steam game into a creator plan.
